title: BiliBiliMedia
description: This mod adds Bilibili support to WaterMedia.
body:
This mod adds Bilibili support to WaterMedia, enabling seamless integration with one of the most popular video platforms in China.

With this compatibility layer, WaterMedia can now directly stream and play videos from the Bilibili website, eliminating the need for manual downloads or third-party tools.

Whether you're watching anime, documentaries, or user-generated content, this mod makes your Bilibili experience smoother and more accessible within Minecraft.
